accounts.name: game
docs: the PDA from the supplied seeds and comparing to bet.game.
May be a live Game account or any pubkey (including a closed account)
— we only use it as the CPI authority handle.

instructions.name: init_platform_vault
docs: Permissionless: create the per-mint platform fee vault. Must exist before
the first game of a given mint is created. Kept out of initialize_game so
that instruction's account-validation stack stays within the BPF 4KB limit.

instructions.name: withdraw_burn_vault
docs: Admin withdraws accumulated jackpot fees from a per-mint burn vault
(for burning CRAZY or swapping other tokens to CRAZY then burning)

instructions.name: withdraw_platform_fees
docs: Admin withdraws accumulated platform fees from a per-mint vault

errors.name: InvalidName
errors.msg: Invalid game name — must be 3-30 characters

errors.name: InvalidRoi
errors.msg: Invalid ROI — must be between 10% and 100%

errors.name: InvalidHostFee
errors.msg: Invalid host fee — must be between 1% and 5%

errors.name: FarmingProtection
errors.msg: Game parameters too easy to farm

errors.name: NotLastBettor
errors.msg: Only the last bettor can claim the jackpot

errors.name: JackpotDelayNotMet
errors.msg: Jackpot delay not yet met — wait 5 minutes after timer expires

errors.name: InvalidFee
errors.msg: Invalid fee — must be between 0% and 10%

errors.name: JackpotNotClaimed
errors.msg: Jackpot must be claimed before closing game

errors.name: PoolNotEmpty
errors.msg: Pool must be empty before closing game

errors.name: BetNotProcessed
errors.msg: Bet is still pending — not yet processed

errors.name: BountyRecipientMismatch
errors.msg: Bounty recipient does not match bet player

errors.name: ForceCloseDelayNotMet
errors.msg: Force close not available yet — wait 30 days after game ends

errors.name: InvalidSalvadorMode
errors.msg: Invalid Salvador mode — must be 0 (off), 1 (fixed), or 2 (progressive)

errors.name: InvalidGameSeeds
errors.msg: Invalid game seeds — supplied (host, name, bump) do not derive to bet.game

errors.name: UnsupportedMintExtension
errors.msg: Unsupported token mint extension — transfer fee / hook / etc. are not allowed

errors.name: SalvadorDisabled
errors.msg: Salvador bounty is disabled for this game (mode 0)

errors.name: BountyExceedsCap
errors.msg: Bounty exceeds the Salvador cap for the unreserved pool

errors.name: MinBetBelowFloor
errors.msg: Min bet is below the per-token floor

errors.name: RandomNotAllowedForToken
errors.msg: This token is not enabled for random Salvador

errors.name: PoolBelowRandomThreshold
errors.msg: Initial pool is below the random-Salvador threshold

errors.name: BadRandomnessAccount
errors.msg: Randomness account is invalid — wrong owner or not bound to this salvation

errors.name: RandomnessNotFulfilled
errors.msg: ORAO randomness is not fulfilled yet
